headlines: Confirm timeframe and sources before I search

articles.title: Clarify time window
articles.summary: Do you mean the most recent 24 hours ending today (March 30, 2026)? I can fetch news from that window or widen to 48–72 hours if coverage is thin.

articles.title: Confirm preferred outlets
articles.summary: Should I prioritize US/English outlets (CoinDesk, Reuters, Bloomberg, Cointelegraph, The Block) or include wider/global/local sources?
